name: ZW - Tornado Bringer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＺＷ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゼアル・ウェポン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>風神雲龍剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>トルネード・ブリンガー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl_base: ZW - Wind God Cloud Dragon Sword
desc: You can target 1 "Utopia" monster you control; equip this monster from your hand or face-up field to that target. It gains 1300 ATK. While this card is equipped to a monster, your opponent cannot target that monster with card effects. If a monster equipped with this card would be destroyed by battle, destroy this card instead. You can only control 1 face-up "ZW - Tornado Bringer".
mnst_eff: You can target 1 "Utopia" monster you control; equip this monster from your hand or face-up field to that target. It gains 1300 ATK. While this card is equipped to a monster, your opponent cannot target that monster with card effects. If a monster equipped with this card would be destroyed by battle, destroy this card instead. You can only control 1 face-up "ZW - Tornado Bringer".
eff: You can target 1 "Utopia" monster you control; equip this monster from your hand or face-up field to that target. It gains 1300 ATK. While this card is equipped to a monster, your opponent cannot target that monster with card effects. If a monster equipped with this card would be destroyed by battle, destroy this card instead. You can only control 1 face-up "ZW - Tornado Bringer".

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
